# Forwarder Comparison Benchmarks

This page is automatically updated by the
[testbed CI workflow](https://github.com/Quarmire/ndn-rs/actions/workflows/testbed.yml)
on every push to `main` and weekly on Mondays.

> **Transport note:** `shm` (shared-memory) face transport is only available
> for `ndn-fwd`. NFD and yanfd are benchmarked over UDP. Numbers using
> different transports are **not** directly comparable — the table labels
> each transport explicitly.
